sub_goals.description: host.js — WebSocket client to ws://127.0.0.1:{port}/ with registerPlugin handshake per probe-ip1/C.1.2; event dispatcher for willAppear/willDisappear/keyDown/keyUp/touchBarTap/touchBarSlide; setTitle/setImage outbound; logMessage routing.
process-utils.js — spawnSidecar(command,args), lifecycle (onStartup/onShutdown), log() routing into host's logMessage event per contracts/host-integration--now-playing-source.json.

verification_rationale: Both builders' outputs were verified against contracts/original/host-integration--touchbar-renderer.json (drawText, onWillAppear, onWillDisappear, ActionContext) and contracts/original/host-integration--now-playing-source.json (spawnSidecar, log, onStartup, onShutdown). Acceptance assertions S1.A1 (WebSocket connect+registerPlugin within 5s), S1.A2 (willAppear/willDisappear dispatch), S1.A3 (drawText reaches host — externally unreachable per assertion source; verified internally that drawText composes the host-protocol setTitle/setFeedback messages with target context per Builder's reading of the live SDK template), and S1.A4 (child_process supervision with .kill()) are exercised by edge-case-testing in section-5.
